## 🚀 About Me

I'm passionate about learning new things and exploring different ideas.  

- 🔭 Currently working on: **CruzadaDelSur** (Unreal Engine C++ game project)

## 📌 Featured Projects

### 🧩 CruzadaDelSur
Narrative tactical card-based battle game built in Unreal Engine (C++)  
Focus on scalable backend design and clean architecture.

### 🖧 Duck Game (remake) Multiplayer Game
C++ socket-based server with threading and custom communication protocol.
